member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Performance.ServiceCollectionDecorator.UseMeasureAction(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the necessary registrations to the service collection.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Performance.IMeasureAction
member.summary: Defines a contract for measuring the execution of an action and returning its result.
member.remarks: Implementations of this interface can be used to record metrics, such as execution time or resource usage, for the specified action. The measurement details and how they are recorded depend on the implementation.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Performance.IMeasureAction.Measure``1(Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasurableActionDelegate{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Executes the specified action and measures its execution time, returning the result produced by the action.
member.remarks: Use this method to measure the duration of an operation while capturing its result. The action is executed synchronously. If the action throws an exception, the exception is propagated to the caller and no result is returned.
member.typeparam: The type of the value returned by the measured action.
member.param: A delegate representing the action to execute and measure. Cannot be null.
An optional name used to identify the measured action in logs or reports. Defaults to "measured".
member.returns: The value returned by the executed action.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasurableActionDelegate`1
member.summary: Public delegate that defines an action with a return type.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction
member.summary: Allows any method or block of code to be measured for performance.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction})
member.summary: Creates an instance of with the specified logger./>

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction.Logger
member.summary: Gets/sets the logger for this instance.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction.Measure``1(Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasurableActionDelegate{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Measure the method or block of code.
member.param: The method or block of code to run.
The name of the action used in the log.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction.Measure(System.Action,System.String)
member.summary: Measure the method or block of code.
member.param: The method or block of code to run.
The name of the action used in the log.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction.MeasureAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.String)
member.summary: Measure an asynchronous method or block of code.
member.param: The async method or block of code to run.
The name of the action used in the log.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Performance.MeasureAction.MeasureAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.String)
member.summary: Measure an asynchronous method or block of code with no return value.
member.param: The async method or block of code to run.
The name of the action used in the log.
